name: Southwest Blackeyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Tobasco or other hot sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for at least 10 minutes, or up to 20-25 minutes for best results.
4. Serve with cornbread and spinach, if desired. This recipe serves 2 to 4 people.
